hero.headline: A community orchestra for the Eastside.
hero.subhead: We're a 501(c)(3) nonprofit of working professionals who happen to also be musicians, putting on concerts around Redmond and the greater Seattle area.

intro.heading: Bringing live orchestral music to the Eastside.
body: RTO was started in 2024 by a few musicians who'd spent their post-college years missing their instruments. The pitch was simple: a place for working adults to keep playing the music they love, in front of audiences who actually live in the neighborhood.
Three years in, we're a full orchestra rehearsing weekly and performing several times a year. Our concerts are free or low-cost on purpose. Bring a friend, bring your kids, and we'll see you there.
